name: wvm-boarddocs
description: BoardDocs public meeting data scraper for West Valley-Mission Community College District

scripts.check: node --check scripts/scrape-boarddocs.mjs && node --check scripts/build-site.mjs && bash -n scripts/scrape-boarddocs.sh scripts/scrape-wvm-boarddocs.sh && node scripts/scrape-boarddocs.mjs --help
scripts.refresh: npm run scrape:wvm -- --refresh && npm run build:site
